briefs.title: Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation amended — new Schedule 1 entries take effect February 4
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 5/2026 amends the Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation (B.C. Reg. 175/2004) by adding new entries to Schedule 1, effective February 4, 2026. This expands the list of bylaw contraventions enforceable through notice-based ticketing by local governments.
briefs.action_required: Check if your municipality issues bylaw notices and review the updated Schedule 1 for any new contraventions affecting your business.

key_dates.label: BC Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation Schedule 1 amendment takes effect
